column1: # Ciocan et al. (2026) MUSE-DARK trilogy + Varasteanu et al. (2025) data
# Used by:
#   publication/a0_evolution.py  -> Fig 9 (a0(z) and Sigma_DM(z) panels)
#   publication/paper_heat_letter.tex Sec 4.5 (direct a0(z) test)
# References:
#   Ciocan+2026  Paper I    : arXiv:2506.19721  (MUSE-DARK-I: halo properties)
#   Jeanneau+2026 Paper II  : arXiv:2603.28856  (MUSE-DARK-II: lensed bTFR)
#   Ciocan+2026  Paper III  : arXiv:2604.22613  (MUSE-DARK-III: RAR evolution)
#   Varasteanu+2025         : (MIGHTEE-HI low-z bTFR-derived a0)
#   McGaugh+2016            : SPARC z=0 anchor (a0 = 1.20 +/- 0.26 e-10 m/s^2)
# All a0 values are in units of 10^-10 m/s^2.
# Section 1: per-bin a0 measurements
#   Ciocan+2026 Fig.3 binned values are read from the figure (visual extraction).
#   The Ciocan team kindly tabulated their fit triplets in the appendix; we
#   reproduce those triplets in section 3 below.
#   "section" column distinguishes section-1 / section-2 / section-4 rows.
section
# Section 3: linear-fit triplets a0(z) = a0(0) + a1*z (Ciocan+2026 Paper III)
#   These are NOT plotted as data points; they are reference curves.
# These triplets are consumed directly inside publication/a0_evolution.py.
